Concept: Supply Chain and Materials Availability

Creator

Description

This includes market demand.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Supply Chain and Materials Availability in Model Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Supply Chain and Materials Availability in Diagram Treat Batteries at End-of-Life in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Supply Chain and Materials Availability in Diagram Recover Materials/Devices in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Supply Chain and Materials Availability in Diagram Repurpose in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Supply Chain and Materials Availability in Diagram Remanufacture in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Supply Chain and Materials Availability in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
